text: Client onboarding checklist: 1. NDA signed 2. Technical requirements doc 3. API credentials provisioned 4. Kickoff call scheduled
For enterprise clients, we need SOC2 compliance docs ready before the kickoff. Check with legal@company.com
Typical onboarding timeline: Week 1 - Discovery, Week 2 - Integration, Week 3 - Testing, Week 4 - Go-live
Make sure to add the client to our Datadog monitoring before go-live. The dashboard template is in Notion.
If the client uses SSO, coordinate with IT team to set up SAML integration. Usually takes 2-3 days.
